description.en: Resolve MRO entries dynamically as specified by PEP 560. This function looks for items in bases that are not instances of type, and returns a tuple where each such object that has an __mro_entries__() method is replaced with an unpacked result of calling this method. If a bases item is an instance of type, or it doesn’t have an __mro_entries__() method, then it is included in the return tuple unchanged. Added in version 3.7.

excerpt.es: Resolve MRO entries dynamically as specified by PEP 560. This function looks for items in bases that are not instances of type, and returns a tuple where each such object that has an __mro_entries__()...
